variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 6203 Engine Breather Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAO 6203 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 6203 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 6203 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: ENGINE BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 103.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 30.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 102.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 97.0 mm, No. Check Valves: 1

variants.title: Fleetguard CV50855 Purchased Finished CV-Unit Or Kit | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 6203
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard CV50855 Purchased Finished CV-Unit Or Kit | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 6203
variants.description: Fleetguard® CV50855 crankcase ventilation unit features patented technologies that control oil drip and emissions with the highest oil and particle removal efficiency available.
